chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No. D-4911 of 2024 Date Order with Signature of Judge Hearing of Case 1. For order on Misc. No. 5093/2025 (Urgent/A) 2. For order on Misc. No. 5094/2025 3. For hearing of main case 11-03-2025 Mr. Abdul Majeed Khoso Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Zohaib Korai Advocate holds brief for Mr. Khalid Mehmood Siddiqui Advocate for the Respondent Mr. Sandeep Malani, Assistant Advocate General Sindh Mr. Kashif Nazir, Assistant Attorney General The petitioner seeks the exercise of writ jurisdiction of this Court to end electricity load-shedding and to ensure uninterrupted electricity supply. Directions are also sought to abolish the tariff / slab pricing formula and for a forensic audit of the entire amounts received by utility companies in the last 2 years. Upon being confronted as to the locus standi of the petitioner to seek such omnibus relief, learned counsel remained unable to assist. Notwithstanding the patent issues of maintainability, the issue raised could not be adjudicated without recourse to inquiry, investigation, evidence etc. and the same is not amenable to be undertaken in writ jurisdiction. The petition is found to be misconceived, hence, dismissed. Judge Judge Amjad PS
